name: Mt Pelerin
description: Swiss crypto on-ramp API with fiat-to-crypto and off-ramp flows plus tokenization.

seo.title: Mt Pelerin — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Mt Pelerin: Swiss crypto on-ramp API with fiat-to-crypto and off-ramp flows plus tokenization.

when_to_use: Fiat-to-crypto on-ramp for Swiss-regulated DeFi apps
Off-ramp flows for crypto wallet cashout to EUR/CHF
Tokenizing real-world assets via Swiss API
KYC-compliant crypto purchase widget for fintech portals

cons: Swiss and European bias in coverage
Smaller scale than Moonpay or Transak
Tokenization niche may not matter to most
review.verdict: Niche Swiss-regulated on/off-ramp — pick it when compliance and tokenization matter more than rate.
review.best_for: EU and Swiss-regulated projects needing crypto ramps with tokenization
review.not_for: Global consumer apps prioritizing lowest fees and broadest coverage
